org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.ConditionalOnMissingBean

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat
Embedded Tomcat integration for Juneau microservices.

  • Uses of ConditionalOnMissingBean in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty with annotations of type ConditionalOnMissingBean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    jakarta.servlet.Servlet
    HealthProbeConfiguration.healthProbeServlet()
    Probe servlet bean discovered by JettyServerComponent.
    HealthProbeSettings
    HealthProbeConfiguration.healthProbeSettings()
    Default probe settings bean.
    JettyServerFactory
    JettyConfiguration.jettyServerFactory()
    Contributes the default Jetty server factory used to build the Server from a jetty.xml file.
    JettySettings
    JettyConfiguration.jettySettings()
    Contributes an empty default JettySettings so JettyServerComponent always finds one in the store.

  • Uses of ConditionalOnMissingBean in org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat with annotations of type ConditionalOnMissingBean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TomcatServerFactory
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatServerFactory()
    Contributes the default Tomcat server factory used to build the Tomcat instance.
    TomcatSettings
    TomcatConfiguration.tomcatSettings()
    Contributes an empty default TomcatSettings so TomcatServerComponent always finds one in the store.
